enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder on June 7, 2017, explaining a two-day gap in posting due to the hassle of his green-screen setup, then shares his plan to simplify by mounting green paper directly to the bathroom wall. He gives an update on his ongoing project of cataloging every classic book in history on his website — currently deep in Polybius — and excitedly previews a future video about using his phone's text-to-speech to listen to Wikipedia articles all day.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: current green-cloth setup is too cumbersome; switching to fixed green paper on bathroom wall will be simpler and higher quality
deeply motivated to catalog every classic book's page count and reading time; fascination with the scale keeps him going
most time-consuming entry in the project yet due to the number of books and chapters, but a major accomplishment when done
thinks it may be the best invention he has encountered; extremely excited about passive learning while going about daily life
